system.description: With powerful damage from a distance and deadly aim, your attacks from a distance are lethal. Add 1d6 to your dice pool when making ranged attacks.

When you speak, people are naturally inclined to listen — your powers make others susceptible to believing you. When you attempt to convince someone using your powers, add 1d6 to your dice pool. If using the Manipulate move, targets can be tricked into wasting their turn or letting down their guard but will not do anything actively harmful to themselves or allies.

Outside the Action: Civilians (power level 0) are generally receptive to your harmless suggestions and do not make a Resist roll when you use the Manipulate move.

You have trained yourself in the art of stealth. When you use the Hide move to avoid detection, you gain one automatic success. Roll your dice pool as normal, counting any additional successes.

Outside the Action: When using this ability, civilians (Power Level 0) never spot you.

You can see connections between people, clues, and coincidences more clearly than others. When you roll one or more successes when using the Understand move, you can ask a related yes or no question that the GM must answer truthfully.
Your determination and grit let you shrug off powerful blows. When calculating your Resist Score, double your Acuity stat.

You excel at taking on enemy combatants with technical precision. When you take damage from a sentient creature, make a Presence roll to focus on that opponent. On a success, add 1d6 to your dice pool for attacks against that target. The effect ends when you attack a different opponent or a different opponent attacks you.
system.condition: Against a focused target after taking damage from them

system.description: You have control over a specific type of energy (e.g. fire, ice, lightning, or thunder). When using this ability, make Attack rolls with either Acuity or Presence (your choice). Add 1d6 to your dice pool when performing any moves using your chosen energy.
system.condition: When performing moves using your chosen energy

system.description: You have control over a specific type of energy (e.g. fire, ice, lightning, or thunder). When using this ability, make Attack rolls with either Acuity or Presence (your choice). Add 2d6 to your dice pool when performing any moves using your chosen energy.
system.condition: When performing moves using your chosen energy

system.description: You can fly. Flying speed is determined by your Movement. Flying uses your Movement, so you cannot use your Movement and then fly on the same turn. If you are flying, you don't have to land at the end of your turn.

Your incredible invention is evidence of your brilliance and the source of your powers. Your invention grants you the benefits of another Level 1 ability. [Optional] Your invention also functions as a piece of Gear with a +2 Gear bonus.
system.condition: When using the invention as gear

system.description: Your touch is a soothing balm to your injured allies. You may spend 1 Will to heal an ally for 1d6 Will.

Your strength makes your melee attacks hit hard. Add 1d6 to all Physique-based melee attacks.

Outside the Action: You can easily lift up to 400 lbs without a roll.
system.condition: Physique-based melee attacks

system.description: A mighty artifact empowers you. The artifact has a personality that encourages you to help others; if your actions fail to live up to its standards, it withholds its powers. While using your artifact, add 1d6 to your dice pool. The artifact also grants the benefits of another Level 1 ability.
system.condition: When using the artifact to perform a move or attack

system.description: You have cultivated your public image to build a following. During a Character or Montage scene you can ask your fans for help — sharing information or performing a simple task. Make a Presence roll. On a success, they help you accomplish your goal.
system.condition: Presence roll to get fans to help

system.description: You have the ability to become invisible and visible at will. Add 2d6 to all Hide move rolls when invisible.
system.condition: When invisible

system.description:
You can create minor harmless illusions. They look real at first glance but with inspection it becomes apparent they are constructed. Creatures Near can make a Resist Acuity roll with a 1d6 Circumstance penalty. Creatures Far or further have a 2d6 Circumstance penalty.

Outside the Action: With time to concentrate, your illusions hold up to initial inspection, but a closer look reveals they are fake.

You can take or create something and give it physical form. Using a move, you can create an object less than 30 pounds and no larger than 5 feet in any direction. The object lasts until you dismiss it or create another.
You have control over a specific type of matter (e.g. metal, rock, or wood). Roll with either Acuity or Presence (your choice). Add 2d6 for any moves using your chosen material.
system.condition: Moves using your chosen material

system.description: Your body can transition from fully physical to another state. It takes your move to phase out. You can phase back in freely. While phased out, physical attacks cannot harm you, but you cannot interact with physical objects.

You can manipulate and control the way people perceive reality. Plant an image in your target's mind no larger than a person. The image can move but cannot interact with the world. Roll with Acuity or Presence. Your target must make an opposed Presence Resist roll. On a failure, they believe the image is real.

You have very limited precognitive abilities. Roll a d6. You can subtract or add that many successes to any one roll, possibly turning a success into a failure or vice versa. You may do this twice per episode.

Use a move to change your form to take on the shape of something else. You can revert at any time. Work with your GM to determine what you can shapeshift into and what stats those forms use. If you took damage in shifted form before reverting, any remaining Will and Resist from the shifted form replaces your paragon form values if they are lower than your maximum.
Your Movement is 24. Add 1d6 to your dice pool when making a melee attack after moving in a straight line towards your target on your turn.
system.condition: Melee attack after moving in a straight line toward target

system.description: Increase your Physique by 1. You can take this ability multiple times. You cannot increase any stat above 6 with this ability.
Increase your Finesse by 1. You can take this ability multiple times. You cannot increase any stat above 6 with this ability.
Increase your Stamina by 1. You can take this ability multiple times. You cannot increase any stat above 6 with this ability.
Increase your Acuity by 1. You can take this ability multiple times. You cannot increase any stat above 6 with this ability.
Increase your Presence by 1. You can take this ability multiple times. You cannot increase any stat above 6 with this ability.
You are experienced with technology and all its functions. Add 1d6 to your dice pool when rolling to operate technology, or when using technology to perform another move.
system.condition: Rolling to operate technology or using technology to perform another move

system.description: You can manipulate objects around you with your mind. You may use your Acuity stat for any moves normally rolled using Physique.
You can speak into the minds of others and hear the thoughts of willing characters. To read the mind of an unwilling character, you must succeed on an opposed Acuity check.

You can move through space rapidly, disappearing and reappearing within Far range. If you teleport somewhere you cannot see or have never seen, roll 1d6. On a 1, you re-appear in the same space as another person or object, lose 2 Will, and are shunted to the nearest unoccupied space.
You are resilient to incoming damage. Double your Physique stat when calculating your Resist score.

You can influence the flow of time around you. Choose from: (1) Slow everyone else — for up to two rounds, use two moves on your turn and appear faster. (2) Speed everyone else — you forgo acting on your first turn to use a move on your second turn and appear slower. After using this ability, you sacrifice one turn to recover.

Outside the Action: You can control the flow of time for several hours, but age accordingly.

You possess a treacherous artifact that empowers you. The artifact has a personality that entices you to act selfishly; if your actions fail its standards, it withholds its powers. While using the artifact, add 1d6 to your dice pool. The artifact also grants the benefits of another Level 1 ability.
system.condition: When using the artifact to use a move or attack

system.description: Your ability to track the flow of time has increased. You may now use the Seer ability up to four times per episode.
You have mastered the art of disguise. You can mimic the voice of anyone you have spoken to for at least 10 minutes and take on their form as you have witnessed them.
Your skill with controlling energy has increased. Add 2d6 to your dice pool for energy attacks and moves, on top of your dice from Energy Control. (Total: 3d6 Generalist / 4d6 Specialist)
system.condition: Energy attacks and moves (on top of Energy Control)

system.description: Your artifact increases in power. Add 1d6 to your dice pool for attacks or moves made using the artifact. (Total: 2d6)
system.condition: Attacks or moves using the artifact (total 2d6)

system.description: Increase your Physique by 1 and its maximum to 7. You can take this ability multiple times, choosing a different stat each time.
Increase your Finesse by 1 and its maximum to 7. You can take this ability multiple times, choosing a different stat each time.
Increase your Stamina by 1 and its maximum to 7. You can take this ability multiple times, choosing a different stat each time.
Increase your Acuity by 1 and its maximum to 7. You can take this ability multiple times, choosing a different stat each time.
Increase your Presence by 1 and its maximum to 7. You can take this ability multiple times, choosing a different stat each time.

You can now teleport up to 10 miles so long as you know where you are going. You can also bring another person with you. When you travel more than Distant range, you are unable to use your powers for the next minute.
Your skill at controlling material has increased. Add 2d6 to your dice pool for material attacks and abilities, on top of your dice from Matter Control. (Total: 3d6)
system.condition: Material attacks and abilities (on top of Matter Control)

system.description:
When you make a melee attack, add 2d6 on top of your dice pool from Heavy Hitter. (Total: 3d6)

Outside the Action: Your strength improves. You can lift up to 600 lbs with ease.
system.condition: On top of Heavy Hitter (total 3d6)

system.description:
When you use Telepathy to make a Manipulate move against a single target, add 2d6 to your dice pool. On a failure of the resist roll, you can hold the effect for up to a minute. At the end of each round, the target can make their resist roll again (1 success breaks the effect). Targets cannot be manipulated to harm themselves or allies.

Outside the Action: Without distraction, the effect doesn't end until the target accumulates successes equal to your Manipulate roll successes.
system.condition: Using Telepathy against a single target

system.description: You move unseen and unheard. When using Cloaking, you automatically gain an additional success (total two automatic successes) and roll your dice pool as normal.
When you make a ranged attack, add 1d6 on top of your dice pool from Blaster. (Total: 2d6)
system.condition: On top of Blaster (total 2d6)

system.description: You have created a signature move. Name it and define what makes it special. When you perform it, nearby opponents must make a Resist Presence roll. On a failure, they become demoralized and have a 1d6 Circumstance penalty to all rolls until the end of your next turn. Publicly using your signature move can boost your reputation.
Once per episode, when your Resist score is 0 and you would be reduced to 0 Will, you instead have 1 Will remaining.
Your Movement is 32. When making a melee attack after moving towards your target in a straight line, add 2d6 on top of your dice from Speedster. (Total: 3d6)
system.condition: Melee after straight-line approach, on top of Speedster (total 3d6)

system.description: Your skills with tech feel like second nature. When using a move to interact with technology, add 2d6 on top of your dice pool from Technologist. (Total: 3d6)
system.condition: Using a move to interact with technology, on top of Technologist (total 3d6)

system.description: Whenever you add gear dice to your dice pool, add an additional 2d6.
system.condition: Whenever you add gear dice to your pool

system.description: After speaking with or observing someone for at least 10 minutes, you can perfectly copy their voice, body language, and mannerisms. If you transform into them, you can wear any clothes you wish. Add 3d6 to your dice pool when using a Manipulate or Persuade move to deceive others that you are them.
system.condition: Manipulate or Persuade when deceiving others you are someone else

system.description: When you make a ranged attack, add 2d6 on top of your dice from Sharpshooter. (Total: 4d6)
system.condition: On top of Sharpshooter (total 4d6)

system.description:
When you make a melee attack, add 2d6 on top of your dice from Powerful Blows. (Total: 5d6)

Outside the Action: Your might is the stuff of legend. You can lift up to 900 lbs with ease.
system.condition: On top of Powerful Blows (total 5d6)

system.description: Your skill with controlling energy is unmatched. Add 1d6 to your dice pool for energy attacks and moves, on top of your dice from Energy Mastery. (Total: 4d6 Generalist / 5d6 Specialist)
system.condition: Energy attacks and moves, on top of Energy Mastery

system.description: Your artifact increases in power. Increase one of your stats by 1. Add 2d6 to attacks and moves made using the artifact. (Total: 4d6)
system.condition: Attacks and moves using the artifact (total 4d6)

system.description: Prolonged practice has given you mastery over certain types of violence. When you use the Attack move, you may Attack in an identical way a second time against either the same or a different opponent as part of the same move.
Your skill at controlling matter is unmatched. Add 3d6 to your dice pool for material attacks and abilities, on top of your dice from Matter Mastery. (Total: 5d6)
system.condition: Material attacks and abilities, on top of Matter Mastery (total 5d6)

system.description: You never give up, no matter how big the challenge. Quadruple your Acuity stat when calculating your Resist score.
You have mastered the art of reading the flow of time. You can now use your Seer ability once per scene.

You can open a portal to another location on the planet, so long as you know where you are going. You can bring up to ten people with you, but will be unable to use your powers for a turn after doing so.
Twice per episode when your Will is below its maximum, you recover 1d6 Will.
When using Cloaking, you automatically gain an additional success (total three automatic successes) and roll your dice pool as normal.

When you use a Signature Move to defeat an opponent, nearby foes quake in fear. If they fail their Resist Presence roll, they attempt to flee the scene. If you attack a fleeing foe, gain a 2d6 Circumstance bonus.
Choose one of your Enhanced Stats. Increase your Physique and its maximum to 8.
Choose one of your Enhanced Stats. Increase your Finesse and its maximum to 8.
Choose one of your Enhanced Stats. Increase your Stamina and its maximum to 8.
Choose one of your Enhanced Stats. Increase your Acuity and its maximum to 8.
Choose one of your Enhanced Stats. Increase your Presence and its maximum to 8.
You and technology are one. When working with computers, you complete easy tasks without a roll. When operating technology, add 1d6 to your dice pool. (Total: 3d6 with Tech Genius)
system.condition: When operating technology, on top of Tech Genius (total 3d6)

system.description: Blows that would defeat even the toughest heroes don't phase you. Quadruple your Physique stat when calculating your Resist score.
